mapper.update: INSERT INTO cv_video_info (name, state, leader, actor, img_url, part, ins, public_date, autoupdate_lock) VALUES (#{name}, #{state}, #{leader}, #{actor}, #{imgUrl}, #{part}, #{ins}, #{publicDate}, '0') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), name = VALUES(name), state = VALUES(state), leader = VALUES(leader), actor = VALUES(actor), img_url =VALUES(img_url), part = VALUES(part), ins = VALUES(ins), public_date = VALUES(public_date);
INSERT INTO cv_week_table (vid, week) VALUES (#{vid}, #{week}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE week = VALUES(week);
mapper.select: select autoupdate_lock from cv_video_info where name = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into cv_updater_log (message,time,level) values (concat('周期表已更新',#{count},'条'),now(),'info')
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM cv_week_table WHERE (vid, week) NOT IN
(#{item.vid}, #{item.week})
